Ben Tennyson: Benjamin Kirby Tennyson is the main protagonist. At age 10, he found the Omnitrix during a summer vacation with his Grandpa Max and cousin Gwen. He uses it to transform into various aliens to fight crime and alien threats. Though often arrogant and immature, Ben has a strong sense of heroism and morality.
The Omnitrix: The Omnitrix is a watch-like device created by Azmuth of the Galvan race. It allows the user to alter their DNA and transform into various alien species. It was originally intended to be a tool of peace to help different species understand each other, but is often sought after as a weapon by villains like Vilgax.
Gwen Tennyson: Gwendolyn Tennyson is Ben's cousin. She is highly intelligent and skilled in martial arts. She later discovers she has an affinity for magic, which is revealed to be her Anodite heritage (an energy being race).
Grandpa Max: Maxwell Tennyson is Ben and Gwen's grandfather. He appears to be a normal retired man traveling in his RV (the Rustbucket), but is actually a legendary retired Plumber—an intergalactic law enforcement agent.
Kevin Levin: Kevin Ethan Levin is an Osmosian who can absorb the properties of any solid matter he touches. Originally an antagonist who absorbed Ben's aliens and became mutated, he reformed in Alien Force and became a core member of Ben's team, as well as Gwen's boyfriend.
Vilgax: Vilgax is a Chimera Sui Generis warlord and Ben's arch-nemesis. He is a ruthless intergalactic conqueror who will stop at nothing to obtain the Omnitrix so he can build an army capable of conquering the universe.
Plumbers: The Plumbers are an intergalactic law enforcement organization. Grandpa Max was one of their most legendary agents on Earth. They protect the universe from alien threats and regulate extraterrestrial activity on Earth.
Alien X: Alien X is a Celestialsapien, an omnipotent alien capable of warping reality. However, to perform any action, the three personalities inside the alien (Bellicus, Serena, and Ben) must agree. Because Bellicus and Serena constantly argue, transforming into Alien X usually leaves Ben paralyzed and useless in a fight.
Azmuth: Azmuth is a Galvan, recognized as the smartest being in five galaxies. He is the creator of the Omnitrix. He is highly cynical and disappointed in how the universe constantly tries to use his peaceful invention as a weapon.
